CIPHER.1174.cipherString: Why should I not regard this as desirable--not because the fire burns me, but because it does not overcome me?
CIPHER.1174.question: A quote by Seneca the Younger has been encoded as an Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1174.author: Seneca the Younger

CIPHER.1175.cipherString: The world could change in a second, so I find the sunshine beckons me to open up the gate and dream.
CIPHER.1175.question: The marching band's sheet music rearranged itself into this Atbash pattern—it's a quote by Robbie Williams. What does it say?
CIPHER.1175.author: Robbie Williams

CIPHER.1176.cipherString: I advocate eating nutritious food (I'm a vegetarian), working out, being in top form mentally and physically.
CIPHER.1176.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote by Martina Navratilova, encrypted as an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains the word AND. What does it say?
CIPHER.1176.author: Martina Navratilova

CIPHER.1177.cipherString: The gazelles so gentle and clever Skip lightly in frolicsome mood.
CIPHER.1177.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote, written in a Porta using a keyword of ANTLER. What does it say?

CIPHER.1178.cipherString: What ought a man to be? Well, my short answer is 'himself'.
CIPHER.1178.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote by Henrik Ibsen encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of OCCUPY and polybius key of WOODWORKER. What does it say?
CIPHER.1178.author: Henrik Ibsen

CIPHER.1179.cipherString: If every fool wore a crown, we should all be kings.
CIPHER.1179.question: The following symbols encode a Welsh Proverb using a Baconian alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.1179.author: Welsh Proverb

CIPHER.1180.cipherString: The outcome of a day with white spaces is far greater than a packed day extending to long working hours.
CIPHER.1180.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Sukant Ratnakar encoded in a Caesar cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1180.author: Sukant Ratnakar

CIPHER.1181.cipherString: The rose-buds in the morning dew, How pure among the leaves so green!
CIPHER.1181.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote, written as a Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword length of 5. The 34th through 43rd cipher units (46 65 60 58 39 66 58 56 49 26) decode to be AMONGTHELE. What does it say?

CIPHER.1182.cipherString: Gifts weigh like mountains on a sensitive heart.
CIPHER.1182.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Fractionated Morse-encrypted message by Mme. Fee. You are told that the quote has TIVE in it corresponding to the encoded text R M T A U P, meaning A = ●●–; M = –×●; P = ×●●; R = ●●×; T = ●×●; U = ×●×. What does it say?
CIPHER.1182.author: Mme. Fee

CIPHER.1183.cipherString: Comb down his hair; but look! it still stands upright.
CIPHER.1183.question: Decrypt the following cipher text that has been encoded using the Baconian Cipher. You are told that the deciphered text starts with COMB. What does it say?

CIPHER.1184.cipherString: Con un movimiento seguro, el hombre giró la llave. Un sonido metálico retumbó en la cueva oscura. No había oro ni riquezas.
CIPHER.1184.question: This Spanish-language passage is from a short story about an adventure. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to solve.

CIPHER.1185.cipherString: Reality did not take long to intrude.
CIPHER.1185.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote by Niall Ferguson, written in an Affine Cipher with a=11 and b=2. What does it say?
CIPHER.1185.author: Niall Ferguson

CIPHER.1186.cipherString: An author should have no other biography than his books.
CIPHER.1186.question: The school's ancient overhead projector flickered and burned this Baconian message onto the screen—decode B. Traven's words. What does it say?
CIPHER.1186.author: B. Traven

CIPHER.1187.cipherString: I am learning to forgive my inner geek, and even value him as a friend.
CIPHER.1187.question: Scratched onto the lens of an abandoned telescope, decode this Checkerboard quote by Kenny Loggins with a polybius key of CHEWBACCA. What does it say?
CIPHER.1187.author: Kenny Loggins

CIPHER.1188.cipherString: Like music and art, love of nature is a common language that can transcend political or social boundaries.
CIPHER.1188.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You are told that it's a quote by Jimmy Carter encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1188.author: Jimmy Carter

CIPHER.1189.question: Astronomers notice this repeating sequence in deep-space data. It's actually encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 4981484 17380 decode to?

CIPHER.1190.cipherString: The only difference between a grown-up's mistake and a child's is the size of the consequence.
CIPHER.1190.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Teresa R. Funke encrypted as an Atbash Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1190.author: Teresa R. Funke

CIPHER.1191.cipherString: Between the hammer and the anvil.
CIPHER.1191.question: A message encrypted with the Affine Cipher has been received. You are told that the cipher text ER decodes to be AN. What does it say?

CIPHER.1192.cipherString: Why don't you go somewhere quietly and consult your history books if you have no consciences to consult?
CIPHER.1192.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by Brian Aldiss encoded as a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.1192.author: Brian Aldiss

CIPHER.1193.cipherString: El hombre dio un paso atrás y sonrió. "Te he estado esperando por mucho tiempo." Su silueta empezó a desaparecer, como el humo.
CIPHER.1193.question: Here is another quote from the same Spanish-language adventure story as before. It has also been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt with a different keyword than before. What does it say?

CIPHER.1194.question: Your drone photographed some weird markings in a parking lot. Turns out it's two words encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 6774056310 962 decode to?

CIPHER.1195.cipherString: Empires are only sandhills in the hour-glass of Time; they crumble spontaneously by the process of their own growth.
CIPHER.1195.question: Frozen inside an ice core sample from Antarctica: this Patristocrat message about civilizations by Draper using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher begins with EMPIR. What does it say?
CIPHER.1195.author: Draper

CIPHER.1196.cipherString: The night is my best friend. It calms the storm in my soul and it lets the guiding stars rise.
CIPHER.1196.question: You intercept a mysterious radio signal. Decoding it reveals a quote encrypted as a Complete Columnar. The quote has GUIDING somewhere in it. What does it say?

CIPHER.1197.cipherString: If a man knows the right way, he need not trouble himself about wrong paths.
CIPHER.1197.question: Solve this quote by Lessing that has been encoded using the Porta Cipher. The 39th through 45th cipher characters (UONCRTS) decode to be HIMSELF. What does it say?
CIPHER.1197.author: Lessing

CIPHER.1198.cipherString: Map out your future - but do it in pencil. The road ahead is as long as you make it. Make it worth the trip.
CIPHER.1198.question: A riddle is discovered taped under a chemistry lab bench. It's a quote by Jon Bon Jovi, encrypted as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1198.author: Jon Bon Jovi

CIPHER.1199.cipherString: While the art of printing is left to us science can never be reversed; what is once acquired of real knowledge can never be lost.
CIPHER.1199.question: Someone has left a coded message on the classroom 3D printer's display. You’re told it's a quote by Thomas Jefferson, written in a Patristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher begins with WHILE and contains the word ART somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1199.author: Thomas Jefferson

CIPHER.1200.cipherString: There is something permanent, and something extremely profound, in owning a home.
CIPHER.1200.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Kenny Guinn encoded as a Checkerboard. The 47th through 56th cipher units (NU LL LA AL LA SV PA AA PV PA) decode to be PROFOUNDIN. What does it say?
CIPHER.1200.author: Kenny Guinn

CIPHER.1201.cipherString: A dog teaches a boy fidelity, perseverance, and to turn around three times before lying down.
CIPHER.1201.question: A quote about pets by Robert Benchley has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher for you to decode. What does it say?
CIPHER.1201.author: Robert Benchley

CIPHER.1202.cipherString: Let us go forth with fear and courage and rage to save the world.
CIPHER.1202.question: The message below was encoded into the DNA sequence of a synthetic organism. It translates to a quote by Grace Paley, encrypted using a Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote has US GO in it corresponding to the encoded text Q L T W B K, meaning B = ●×–; K = ––×; L = –×●; Q = ×●●; T = ●●×; W = ×––. What does it say?
CIPHER.1202.author: Grace Paley

CIPHER.1203.cipherString: Late night work and random selfies always go hand-in-hand
CIPHER.1203.question: Your school-issued Chromebook's login screen hijacked itself with this Complete Columnar quote from RJ Yolande Mendes. The quote has SELFIES somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1203.author: RJ Yolande Mendes
